candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line at the top of the income statement; valid top-line measure.
Also an explicit top-line sales line with identical values; useful as an alternative label over time.

variables.notes: Both labels represent the top line and have identical values. Ordered with the non-total sales label first, then total revenue as fallback.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs; appears above personnel and other operating expenses.
Balancing row, not an economic expense line; should not be preferred.

variables.notes: Selected the direct cost line and excluded the balancing row.

candidates.why: Could be an overhead component, but a populated explicit SG&A row exists, so component selection is not needed.
Could be overhead-related, but a populated explicit SG&A row exists, so component selection is not needed.
Broad overhead bucket, but a populated explicit SG&A row exists, so the explicit SG&A row should be used alone.
SG&A subcomponent, but explicit SG&A row exists and is populated.
Explicit SG&A line and populated in the income statement; preferred by hierarchy.
Balance sheet asset line, not period SG&A expense.
Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not SG&A expense.

candidates.row_label: Brand/ Patents/ Trademarks/ Marketing/ Artistic Intangible, Gross
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset line, not SG&A expense.

candidates.row_label: Acc Amort/Imp Brand/ Patents/ Trademarks/ Marketing/ Artistic Intang.
candidates.why: Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Explicit populated SG&A row exists, so selected only that row per hierarchy. Excluded D&A, COGS, totals, and balance sheet asset/amortization rows.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: R&D-related, but this is amortization of capitalized costs in a supplemental section rather than a dedicated above-EBIT R&D expense line.
Balance sheet asset line, not income statement R&D expense.
Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not dedicated current-period R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs, Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No suitable dedicated R&D expense line appears on the income statement. The only R&D-related income statement row is supplemental amortization of capitalized R&D, which is not a current-period R&D expense and should not be used for XRD.

candidates.why: Broad finance cost line; acceptable fallback if no specific interest expense is available.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Most specific interest expense line; preferred for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest component, but narrower than the main interest expense line.
Finance component but not specifically interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest detail; narrower and less preferred than main interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Used the specific interest expense line first, with broader finance expenses as fallback if labels change over time.

candidates.why: Equity component only, not total book equity.

candidates.why: Preferred owner/parent equity line that excludes non-controlling interests.
Total equity line, but less preferred than owner/parent equity because BE should exclude non-controlling interests when possible.
Balancing row, not an equity measure to use.
Balancing row, not an equity measure to use.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not book equity.
Total balance sheet size, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent

variables.notes: Preferred the parent/owner equity line for BE. Included Total Equity as fallback if reporting label changes over time.
No minority interest/non-controlling interest line is present on the provided balance sheet. Since BE uses owner-attributable equity, MIB should be zero.
